overview: A full-stack restaurant ERP on the Internet Computer — managing ingredients, recipes, staff, loans, stock, daily sales, fixed costs, and profitability with a modular sidebar-based interface and real-time data sync via React Query.
features: Ingredient & recipe management with cost calculations
Daily sales tracking and profitability analytics
Fixed costs and business plan modules
Sidebar navigation organized by module (Restaurant, RH, Finance)
Full ICP backend with React Query sync
